---
title: "The Hon. Catherine Charlotte Yonge"
---

## The Hon. Catherine Charlotte Yonge

**Dates:** (d.1905)

**Maiden name:** (Lysaght)

### Description

wife of the Rev. John Eyre Yonge

### Biography

Sometimes her letters are confused with CMY’s in libraries.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
